mapper.select:
SELECT ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, INTE_FORE, RATE, TAX_RATE, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, WORK_TYPE, DATA_SOURCE, RATE_CODE_EAS, RATE_NAME_EAS, EAS_TYPE, EAS_ITEM_RATE_CODE, EAS_ITEM_RATE_NAME FROM T_BUS_RATE
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, INTE_FORE, RATE, TAX_RATE, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DATA_SOURCE FROM T_BUS_RATE where CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} and RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND DATA_SOURCE = 2 AND to_char(START_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_RATE( ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, INTE_FORE, RATE, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TAX_RATE, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WORK_TYPE, DATA_SOURCE, EAS_TYPE, RATE_CODE_EAS, RATE_NAME_EAS, EAS_ITEM_RATE_CODE, EAS_ITEM_RATE_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inteFore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{measurementUnitCode1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{measurementUnitCode2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{workType,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataSource,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{easType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateCodeEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateNameEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{easItemRateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{easItemRateName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_RATE SET RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_NAME = #{rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS = #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID = #{serviceContentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME = #{serviceContentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTE_FORE = #{inteFore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE = #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = #{measurementUnitCode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2 = #{measurementUnitCode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, WORK_TYPE = #{workType,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EAS_TYPE = #{easType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_CODE_EAS = #{rateCodeEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_NAME_EAS = #{rateNameEas, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EAS_ITEM_RATE_CODE = #{easItemRateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EAS_ITEM_RATE_NAME = #{easItemRateName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_RATE( ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, INTE_FORE, RATE, TAX_RATE, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WORK_TYPE, DATA_SOURCE )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inteFore, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{measurementUnitCode1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{measurementUnitCode2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{workType,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dataSource,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

update.foreach:
UPDATE T_BUS_RATE SET RATE_ITEM_CODE = #{item.rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ITEM_NAME = #{item.rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID = #{item.serviceContentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME = #{item.serviceContentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{item.cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{item.cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INTE_FORE = #{item.inteFore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE = #{item.rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_RATE = #{item.taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = #{item.measurementUnitCode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2 = #{item.measurementUnitCode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE = #{item.startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, END_DATE = #{item.endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, REMARK = #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{item.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{item.now}, WORK_TYPE = #{item.workType,jdbcType=BIGINT} WHERE ID = #{item.id}
;

mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_RATE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_RATE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now} where CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} and RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND DATA_SOURCE = 2 AND to_char(START_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')

UPDATE T_BUS_RATE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY = null, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = null, EXAMINE_TIME = null where CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} and RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND DATA_SOURCE = 2 AND to_char(START_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_BUS_RATE WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} and RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND DATA_SOURCE = 2 AND to_char(START_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')

DELETE FROM T_BUS_RATE WHERE ID IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CARGO_CODE) FROM T_BUS_RATE where RATE_ITEM_CODE = '02' AND DATA_SOURCE = 2 AND to_char(START_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') = to_char(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') and CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID serviceContentId, SERVICE_NM serviceContentName, IN_OUT inOut, '内贸' as inteFore FROM t_bus_service UNION ALL
SELECT ID serviceContentId, SERVICE_NM serviceContentName, IN_OUT inOut, '外贸' as inteFore FROM t_bus_service
